inputs.label: Available Work Time per Shift (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Total planned production time per shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.

label_i18n.fr: Temps de travail disponible par équipe (secondes)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned production time per shift excluding breaks and planned downtime.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Molalar ve planlı duruşlar hariç vardiya başına toplam planlı üretim süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte geplante Produktionszeit pro Schicht ohne Pausen und geplante Stillstände.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de production planifié total par équipe hors pauses et arrêts planifiés.

inputs.label: Customer Demand per Shift (units)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units required by the customer per shift.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units required by the customer per shift.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşterinin vardiya başına talep ettiği adet sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vom Kunden pro Schicht geforderte Stückzahl.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités requises par le client par équipe.

inputs.label: Actual Cycle Time (seconds)
inputs.businessContext: Measured average time to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck operation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured average time to complete one unit of product at the bottleneck operation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Darboğaz operasyonunda bir birim ürünü tamamlamak için ölçülen ortalama süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessene durchschnittliche Zeit zur Fertigstellung einer Produkteinheit am Engpass.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen mesuré pour réaliser une unité de produit au goulot d'étranglement.

inputs.label: Average Changeover Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Time required to switch from one product variant to another, including setup and adjustments.

label_i18n.fr: Temps moyen de changement de série (minutes)

businessContext_i18n.en: Time required to switch from one product variant to another, including setup and adjustments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir ürün çeşidinden diğerine geçiş için gereken süre (kurulum ve ayarlar dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeit für den Wechsel von einer Produktvariante zur anderen, einschließlich Einrichtung und Anpassungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps nécessaire pour passer d'une variante de produit à une autre, incluant réglages et configuration.

inputs.label: Average Batch Size (units)
inputs.businessContext: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units produced consecutively before a changeover.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir kalıp değişiminden önce art arda üretilen adet sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der vor einem Rüstvorgang kontinuierlich produzierten Einheiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités produites consécutivement avant un changement de série.

inputs.label: Direct Labor Cost per Hour ($)
inputs.businessContext: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production operators.

label_i18n.fr: Coût direct de main-d'œuvre par heure ($)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully loaded hourly wage including benefits for direct production operators.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direkt üretim operatörleri için yan haklar dahil tam yüklü saatlik ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Voll belasteter Stundenlohn inklusive Zusatzleistungen für direkte Produktionsmitarbeiter.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Salaire horaire chargé incluant les avantages pour les opérateurs de production directs.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., supervision, utilities, maintenance).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of direct labor cost allocated to manufacturing overhead (e.g., supervision, utilities, maintenance).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genel üretim giderlerine (ör. denetim, yardımcı tesisler, bakım) tahsis edilen direkt işçilik maliyeti yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der direkten Arbeitskosten, der den Fertigungsgemeinkosten zugeordnet wird (z. B. Aufsicht, Betriebsstoffe, Instandhaltung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du coût direct de main-d'œuvre alloué aux frais généraux de fabrication (ex. supervision, services publics, maintenance).

inputs.label: Demand Variability Coefficient (CV)
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; used to quantify demand uncertainty.

label_i18n.fr: Coefficient de variabilité de la demande (CV)
label_i18n.es: Coeficiente de variabilidad de la demanda (CV)

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient of variation of daily customer demand; used to quantify demand uncertainty.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Günlük müşteri talebinin varyasyon katsayısı; talep belirsizliğini ölçmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Variationskoeffizient der täglichen Kundennachfrage; dient zur Quantifizierung der Nachfrageunsicherheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de variation de la demande client quotidienne ; utilisé pour quantifier l'incertitude de la demande.

rules.message: Cycle time exceeds takt time. Production cannot meet demand without overtime or additional capacity.
Batch size must be positive when changeover time is greater than zero.
Demand variability coefficient should be between 0 and 2.

thresholds.message: Takt utilization exceeds 95%. Risk of missed deliveries; consider capacity increase or demand smoothing.
Flexibility cost per unit exceeds 10% of direct labor cost per unit. Review changeover reduction initiatives.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
